# Morning conflict check

For each action thread /triage flagged, look at the email's implied
time commitments (meeting requests, deadline mentions, "can you by
Friday" patterns) and cross-reference my Google Calendar for the next
48 hours.

If a flagged thread implies a commitment that conflicts with something
already on my calendar, surface it inline:

  ⚠️  CONFLICT: This thread asks for a 2pm meeting Wednesday.
      You already have "design review" 2-3pm Wednesday.

If no conflicts, do not surface anything.
